name: NoPayn Payment Gateway
shortDescription: Accept payments via NoPayn/Cost+ (Credit Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Vipps/MobilePay)
description:
NoPayn/Cost+ payment gateway integration for modified eCommerce. Supports Credit Card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Maestro, V Pay, Bancontact, Diners, Discover), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Vipps/MobilePay via the Hosted Payment Page (HPP).

Features: PCI DSS compliant hosted payment page, webhook-based order status updates, partial and full refunds from admin.
